name: Accel Magician Mimi
short_description: Girls fight with magic! A mysterious world action game!
detailed_description:
A female ninja fights to punish evil.
This is a simple and exhilarating action game that anyone can enjoy!

←↑→↓: move
X: Attack（keyboard "A")
Ｂ:ATTACK 2（keyboard "W")　　　　
Ａ:Crouching （keyboard "S")　

We recommend buying the bundle. They are all on 90% off.
